services.heading: Every trade for kitchens, baths, whole homes, and more.
services.intro: From discretionary remodels to roofing, solar, and restoration, We The People Construction self-performs and coordinates every trade a Southern California project needs.
services.note: Imagery on this page is representative of the categories of work We The People Construction performs and is not presented as a specific completed project.

cards.title: Kitchen Remodeling
cards.blurb: Layouts, cabinetry, countertops, tile, plumbing, electrical, and finish coordination for the hardest-working room in the home.
cards.alt: Modern kitchen remodel with island and stone counters

cards.title: Bathroom Renovations
cards.blurb: Waterproofing, tile, glass and shower systems, vanities, fixtures, and lighting done to last in high-moisture spaces.
cards.alt: Renovated bathroom with glass shower and stone tile

cards.title: Whole & Full Home Remodeling
cards.blurb: Self-performed general contracting across every trade for open floor plans, systems upgrades, and full interior and exterior renovations.
cards.alt: Contemporary home exterior after full renovation

cards.title: ADUs & Home Additions
cards.blurb: Detached units, garage conversions, and room additions handled through framing, foundation, MEP trades, windows, roofing, and closeout.
cards.alt: Detached accessory dwelling unit in a backyard

cards.title: Roofing & Solar
cards.blurb: Roof replacements and renovations paired with C-46 solar and battery installations to modernize and protect the whole building envelope.
cards.alt: Rooftop solar panel installation on a residential home

cards.title: Restoration & Insurance Claims
cards.blurb: Mold, fire, and water damage restoration plus full insurance-claims remodeling to bring a property back to move-in condition.
cards.alt: Home interior mid-restoration after damage repair

about.heading: A full-service crew built in Hollywood.
about.founderImageAlt: We The People Construction team on a job site
paragraphs: We The People Construction has spent more than twelve years building across Southern California from its headquarters at 958 N Western Ave in Hollywood.
As a design-build general contractor, we self-perform and coordinate every trade a project needs, so homeowners deal with one accountable team from design through the final walkthrough.
Our work spans kitchens, bathrooms, whole-home remodels, ADUs, additions, roofing, solar, and restoration throughout Greater LA, Orange County, and the Inland Empire.

focus.heading: Remodels, additions, exteriors, and restoration.
focus.intro: We The People Construction is built for owners who want one team for the whole scope. The categories below reflect the range of work we self-perform; imagery is representative rather than a specific completed-project claim.

cards.title: Kitchen & Bath
cards.blurb: High-use rooms rebuilt with full cabinetry, countertop, tile, plumbing, and electrical coordination.
cards.alt: Bright renovated kitchen and dining area

cards.title: Outdoor Living & Pools
cards.blurb: Hardscaping, patios, pool building, and backyard remodels designed for the SoCal outdoor lifestyle.
cards.alt: Backyard pool and outdoor living space

cards.title: ADUs & Additions
cards.blurb: Detached units, conversions, and square-footage additions delivered permit-to-keys.

cards.title: Roofing, Solar & Restoration
cards.blurb: Roof replacements, solar and battery installs, and mold, fire, and water restoration work.
cards.alt: Solar and roofing work on a residential roof

process.heading: Design it, permit it, build it, close it out.
process.intro: As a design-build contractor we keep design, trades, permitting, and field work under one roof, so decisions move quickly and nothing falls between vendors.

steps.title: We scope the vision.
steps.blurb: We review the property, goals, budget range, and timeline, then shape a realistic design-build scope.

steps.title: We plan and permit.
steps.blurb: We handle design details, material selections, permitting, and every trade requirement before the build begins.

steps.title: We self-perform the work.
steps.blurb: One crew coordinates framing, MEP trades, finishes, roofing, and inspections on a milestone schedule.

steps.title: We finish and warranty.
steps.blurb: Punch list, final inspections, walkthrough, and follow-up are all handled by the same accountable team.

faq.heading: What Southern California owners ask us first.
faq.intro: A full-service design-build approach removes a lot of the usual remodeling uncertainty. These answers cover scope, permits, trades, and how we work.

items.q: Do you handle design, permits, and every trade?
items.a: Yes. We The People Construction is a design-build general contractor, so design, permitting, and all required trades are coordinated by one team from start to finish.
We are headquartered in Hollywood and serve Greater Los Angeles, Orange County, and the Inland Empire.

items.q: What kinds of projects do you take on?
items.a: Kitchens, bathrooms, whole-home remodels, ADUs and additions, roofing, solar, hardscaping, pools, and mold, fire, and water restoration, including insurance-claims remodeling.

items.q: Can you help with insurance claims and restoration?
items.a: Yes. We handle mold, fire, and water damage restoration and can manage the rebuild side of insurance-claims remodeling.

contact.heading: Tell us about your remodel, addition, or repair.
contact.intro: Send the basics and our team will follow up to understand the property, scope, and timing. Southern California residential projects are our focus.
